---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem you're trying to solve

What user problem or workflow does this feature address? Describe the pain — not the proposed solution — first.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Carve to do? If you have a specific design in mind, describe it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, including doing nothing.

## Where this fits in the roadmap

Carve is built spec-by-spec. If this fits an existing spec in `specs/`, link it. If it's a new direction, say so explicitly so we can talk about whether it fits the current milestone or belongs in a future version.

## Additional context

Anything else — links to similar features in other tools, examples from your own pipelines, screenshots, etc.
